/usr/bin/ar qc libDS2ILib.a CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/build_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/check_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/create_wand_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/dict_perf_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/filter_lists.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/filter_queries.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/print_statistics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DS2ILib.dir/src/queries.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libDS2ILib.a
